title: Privacy Policy
description: This is the privacy policy for this site.
message.about: This is an unofficial fan site. The copyright of the game belongs to Habbit Co., Ltd.
message.accessAnalysis: This site uses Google Analytics, an access analysis tool provided by Google. This Google Analytics uses cookies to collect traffic data. This traffic data is collected anonymously and does not personally identify you. You can refuse to collect this data by disabling cookies, so please check your browser settings. For more information on these terms, please see the Google Analytics Terms of Service.
message.disclaimer: We make every effort to ensure the accuracy of information on this site, but it may contain errors or be outdated. We are not responsible for any damages resulting from the use of this site.
